generated_description: An adversary executed `esentutl.exe` with elevated privileges to extract credential data from the system. The utility was invoked with the `/vss` flag, targeting the `SAM` registry hive located at `C:\windows/system32/config/SAM`, and copied it to `C:\ProgramData\SAM`. This action leveraged the Volume Shadow Copy Service, as indicated by numerous registry modifications, to create a copy of the credential database for offline analysis.
